name: Hot'n Hearty Parmesan Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes, celery, onion, and bacon in a bowl.
2. Toss with dressing until evenly coated.
3. Transfer to a preheated oven set to low heat (approximately 200°F or 90°C).
4. Stir occasionally for about 10 minutes, then remove from heat.
5. Stir in the grated parmesan cheese until well combined.
6. Serve hot and top with additional cheese if desired.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
